questionHtml:
Three stars P, Q and R are plotted in the Hertzsprung-Russel diagram with empty circles.

Which of the following lists the stars in the order of increasing radius?


A.  Q, R, P

B.  P, R, Q

C.  R, Q, P

D.  R, P, Q
